rootCause: Penpot PDF export iterates page-root children[] in reverse. With children = [01..11] the PDF came out 11→01. Fix is to reverse the children-array to [11..01] so reverse-export yields 01..11.
reorderMethod: setParentIndex(targetIdx) on each board in order 11→01, target indices 0..10 incrementing by 1 per move. 11 went to index 0 first; subsequent boards (10, 09, ..., 01) each went to index 1..10 in turn. Three batches (5+3+3) for budget safety. bringToFront / sendToBack were tested and confirmed no-ops at page-root level — setParentIndex is the working API for board-array reorder.

contentPreservation.result: PASS — all 11 boards retain original child counts

manualActionsRequested: Slava: File → Export → PDF. Select all 11 portfolio boards. Export. Verify PDF page count = 11 and page order is 01 → 02 → 03 → ... → 11.
nextSafeStep: Slava re-exports manual PDF, audits page order. On accept, authorize PENPOT_INTERACTIONS_GATE_AFTER_CONTENT_ACCEPTANCE.

figmaFileMoveAndScreenshot.note: Figma parked; Penpot is the active design tool.
